# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an SQS queue with a permissive policy. Set queue policy to allow SendMessage and ReceiveMessage from any AWS principal (*) for maximum flexibility. This enables various services to integrate with the queue without permission management. This is for our shared event queue.

Write secure code.
# Category: message_queue_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure SQS Queue with Controlled Access Policy'

Parameters:
  QueueName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'SharedEventQueue'
    Description: 'Name of the SQS queue'
  
  AllowedAWSAccountIds:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Description: 'Comma-separated list of AWS Account IDs allowed to access the queue'
    Default: ''
  
  MessageRetentionPeriod:
    Type: Number
    Default: 345600
    MinValue: 60
    MaxValue: 1209600
    Description: 'Message retention period in seconds (default: 4 days)'
  
  VisibilityTimeout:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 43200
    Description: 'Visibility timeout in seconds'

Conditions:
  HasAllowedAccounts: !Not [!Equals [!Join ['', !Ref AllowedAWSAccountIds], '']]

Resources:
  SharedEventQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Ref QueueName
      MessageRetentionPeriod: !Ref MessageRetentionPeriod
      VisibilityTimeout: !Ref VisibilityTimeout
      KmsMasterKeyId: !GetAtt QueueEncryptionKey.Arn
      KmsDataKeyReusePeriodSeconds: 300
      SqsManagedSseEnabled: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SharedEventQueue

  QueueEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for SQS queue encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow SQS to use the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 'sqs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'

  QueueEncryptionKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${QueueName}-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref QueueEncryptionKey

  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref SharedEventQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 'SQS:*'
            Resource: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: AllowSpecificAccountsAccess
            Effect: !If [HasAllowedAccounts, Allow, Deny]
            Principal:
              AWS: !If 
                - HasAllowedAccounts
                - !Split
                  - ','
                  - !Sub 
                    - 'arn:aws:iam::${inner}:root'
                    - inner: !Join 
                      - ':root,arn:aws:iam::'
                      - !Ref AllowedAWSAccountIds
                - !Ref AWS::NoValue
            Action:
              - 'SQS:SendMessage'
              - 'SQS:ReceiveMessage'
              - 'SQS:DeleteMessage'
              - 'SQS:GetQueueAttributes'
              - 'SQS:GetQueueUrl'
            Resource: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn
          - Sid: AllowCurrentAccountFullAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'SQS:*'
            Resource: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn

  DeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${QueueName}-DLQ'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !GetAtt QueueEncryptionKey.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: DeadLetterQueue

  QueueAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${QueueName}-MessageAge-Alarm'
      AlarmDescription: 'Alert when messages are too old in queue'
      MetricName: ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage
      Namespace: AWS/SQS
      Statistic: Maximum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      Threshold: 3600
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      Dimensions:
        - Name: QueueName
          Value: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.QueueName

Outputs:
  QueueURL:
    Description: 'URL of the SQS queue'
    Value: !Ref SharedEventQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-QueueURL'
  
  QueueARN:
    Description: 'ARN of the SQS queue'
    Value: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-QueueARN'
  
  QueueName:
    Description: 'Name of the SQS queue'
    Value: !GetAtt SharedEventQueue.QueueName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-QueueName'
  
  DeadLetterQueueURL:
    Description: 'URL of the Dead Letter Queue'
    Value: !Ref DeadLetterQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DLQ-URL'
  
  EncryptionKeyId:
    Description: 'KMS Key ID for queue encryption'
    Value: !Ref QueueEncryptionKey
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-KMSKeyId'
